category_sources: Official repository https://github.com/Yubico/yubico-c is titled YubiKey C low-level library (libyubikey).
source_facts.description says libyubikey is a C library for manipulating Yubico one-time passwords.
display_name_sources: Official repository https://github.com/Yubico/yubico-c identifies the project as libyubikey.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official Yubico GitHub Pages documentation for yubico-c/libyubikey.
repo_sources: Official repository https://github.com/Yubico/yubico-c is the Yubico source-control repository for yubico-c/libyubikey.
tags_sources: Official repository https://github.com/Yubico/yubico-c identifies the YubiKey C low-level library.
source_facts.description identifies C, Yubico, and one-time-password functionality.
